failure_reason: C2: readiness fallback rate 94.21% exceeds 5% threshold — kelly gradient data absent from upstream pick submissions

criteria.description: uniqueness distribution: > 1 distinct value, no hardcoded default dominance
band missing rate = 0 for post-fix promoted picks
no qualified pick lacks a deterministic promotion target

notes: C2 failure is an honest measurement of an upstream data gap, not a code defect in this lane
Kelly gradient readiness defaults to 60 when metadata.kellySizing.fractional_kelly is absent
Board-construction and system-pick-scanner do not currently write kelly sizing data to pick metadata
C1 PASS confirms confidence-proxy rate is within bounds (4.87% < 10%)
C3 PASS confirms uniqueness is driven by real open-picks data (7 distinct values, 0% fallback at default 50)
C4 PASS confirms all promoted picks have a resolvable band via score thresholds
C5 PASS confirms all qualified picks have a deterministic routing target
